title: Artifactory Repository Configuration
description: Configuration schema for JFrog Artifactory repositories including local, remote, virtual, and federated types.

key.description: Unique repository identifier. Must be lowercase and can contain letters, digits, hyphens, dots, and underscores.

rclass.description: Repository class that determines repository behavior.

packageType.description: The package type this repository handles.

notes.description: Internal notes about the repository (not visible to end users).

includesPattern.description: Comma-separated list of artifact path patterns to include.

excludesPattern.description: Comma-separated list of artifact path patterns to exclude.

handleReleases.description: Whether this repository handles release artifacts.

handleSnapshots.description: Whether this repository handles snapshot artifacts.

maxUniqueSnapshots.description: Maximum number of unique snapshots to retain. 0 means unlimited.

suppressPomConsistencyChecks.description: Whether to suppress POM consistency checks for Maven artifacts.

blackedOut.description: Whether the repository is blacked out (all access denied).

propertySets.description: List of property set names to associate with this repository.

archiveBrowsingEnabled.description: Whether browsing of archive contents is enabled.

xrayIndex.description: Whether JFrog Xray indexing is enabled for this repository.

environments.description: List of environments this repository is associated with.

url.description: URL of the remote repository (only for remote repositories).

username.description: Username for authenticating with the remote repository.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the remote repository.

proxy.description: Proxy key for remote repository connections.

unusedArtifactsCleanupPeriodHours.description: Hours to keep unused artifacts before cleanup. 0 means disabled.

assumedOfflinePeriodSecs.description: Seconds to assume remote is offline after a failure.

retrievalCachePeriodSecs.description: Seconds to cache retrieval results from remote.

missedRetrievalCachePeriodSecs.description: Seconds to cache missed retrieval attempts.

repositories.description: List of repository keys resolved by this virtual repository.

defaultDeploymentRepo.description: Default deployment repository for virtual repository deployments.

dockerApiVersion.description: Docker API version for Docker repositories.

forceNugetAuthentication.description: Whether to force authentication for NuGet repositories.

enableTokenAuthentication.description: Whether token authentication is enabled for Docker repositories.
